mapper.select: SELECT m_team.team_id FROM m_user_team JOIN m_team ON m_user_team.team_id = m_team.team_id WHERE m_user_team.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_user_team( user_id, team_id, first_create_date, last_modified_date, last_modified_user ) VALUES( #{userId}, #{teamId}, #{firstCreateDate}, #{lastModifiedDate}, #{lastModifiedUser} )
